description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy heeled thong sandals from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Plastic thong style straps that start at the midfoot Soft plastic toe separator Silica beading over floral printing on the straps Nubuck lining on the straps for durability and style Padded synthetic leather footbed Outsole Durable TPU outsole with cartoon patterns for grip and traction Heel with textured grooves for ergonomic comfort and style Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
